summary: Plan-only remediation assessment over five independent open PRs plus one hydrated linked issue. No merge is recommended because no PR has complete merge preflight proving resolved reviews, clean Codex /review, and clean current checks. Security-shaped PRs #75716 and #85509 are routed to central security handling. The remaining non-security items are kept related or require maintainer/fix-artifact follow-up because no complete executable fix artifact is safe to emit from the provided artifacts.
